svg.title: Cold Start comparison battle card
svg.desc: Tota Agent, Hermes Agent, and OpenClaw comparison card generated from the Tota Agent benchmark report.

g.text: Tota stays serverless-friendly at roughly 50 ms.

svg.text: Source: Tota Agent benchmark report linked in README, May 17 2026.
Runtime caveat: Hermes CPython 3.14, Tota CPython 3.11.14, OpenClaw Node.js 22. Once you're Tota, you'll never be OpenClaw.
